calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiffs Motion For Assignment And Restraining Order Of Certain Patents Of Judgment Debtor Lit Motors Corporation
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jessica Taran, Esq. of , for plaintiff/moving party;
Daniel Kim, T:971.506.1457, defendant appearing in his own behalf.

RULING: The matter was heard concurrently with CGC-17-563414. Mr. Kim is defendant in both cases. Mr. Kim's request to continue the hearing was denied. Mr. Kim argues that service of the motion was improper. After arguments, the Court concluded that both the company and Mr. Kim received proper notice of the motion. Therefore, the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF NIKITA KOZLOVSKI's Amended Motion For Assignment And Restraining Order Of Certain Patents Of Judgment Debtor LIT Motors Corporation is granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Motion For An Assignment And Restraining Order Of Certain Patents Of Judgment Debtor Lit Motors Corporation
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Text Ruling

Motion For An Assignment And Restraining Order Of Certain Patents Of Judgment Debtor Lit Motors Corporation
Off Calendar Dec-05-2019 Continued To Jan-07-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF NIKITA KOZLOVSKI's Motion For An Assignment And Restraining Order Of Certain Patents Of Judgment Debtor Lit Motors Corporation is continued to January 7, 2020 per the amended notice of motion filed November 26, 2019

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
